_comment: Copy to .teamx/config.json on first run. Every key is optional; the devkit falls back to documented defaults when absent. Numeric values are integers. Booleans must be literal true/false (not strings).

autonomy._comment_autonomy: Controls how aggressively the devkit self-approves gate transitions and how feature work is grouped on git branches.

plan._comment: auto_approve_plan_if_safe refuses auto-approval when the plan touches more than this many files. Raise for big refactors; never remove the check.

review._comment: Gates the REVIEW → MERGE auto-advance. require_all_criteria_satisfied forces every acceptance criterion to be satisfied before auto-merge (recommended). required_reviewers >0 forces a human approve_qa_review call.

_branch_strategy_doc.per-task: Legacy behavior: CLASSIFY creates `<prefix><task-slug>` per task → one branch, one MR per task. Easiest to map to trivial refactors.
_branch_strategy_doc.per-feature: Spec-kit style: CLASSIFY creates `<prefix><project>-<us_code>-<us_slug>` once per User Story and every sibling task of the same US reuses the same branch and MR. MERGE must wait until every task of the US is `done`. Recommended for feature work with multiple tasks per story.
